# This test verifies that MMA repair finalizes stuck joint configs. All 10
# ranges start with 2 VOTER_FULL + 1 VOTER_INCOMING. The span config requires 3
# replicas. MMA should finalize by promoting VOTER_INCOMING to VOTER_FULL.
#
# Expected outcome: all VOTER_INCOMING promoted, no under-replicated ranges.

gen_cluster nodes=6 region=(a,b,c) nodes_per_region=(2,2,2)
----

# Create ranges stuck in joint config.
gen_ranges ranges=10 repl_factor=3 placement_type=replica_placement
{s1:*,s2,s3:VOTER_INCOMING}:1
----

set_span_config
[0,9999999999): num_replicas=3
----

assertion type=conformance under=0
----

eval duration=10m seed=42 cfgs=(mma-repair) metrics=(replicas,leases)
----
